entity.minecraft.allay.description: A passive mob found in Outposts and Mansions that brings the player more of any item it's given.

entity.minecraft.arrow.description: A projectile fired from a Bow or Crossbow that can be picked up once grounded.

entity.minecraft.bat.description: An ambient passive mob found in dark caves.

entity.minecraft.breeze_wind_charge.desc: A projectile that knocks away entities on impact.

entity.minecraft.villager.none.descripti: A passive mob found in Villages that gains a trading profession when a new job site is available.
entity.minecraft.villager.shepherd.descr: A passive mob found in Villages that trades in wool blocks. Restocks at a Loom.
entity.minecraft.villager.toolsmith.desc: A passive mob found in Villages that trades in tools. Restocks at a Smithing Table.
entity.minecraft.villager.weaponsmith.de: A passive mob found in Villages that trades in weapons. Restocks at a Grindstone.
entity.minecraft.vindicator.description: A hostile mob found in Raids and Woodland Mansions that wields an Iron Axe.
entity.minecraft.wandering_trader.descri: A passive mob that appears randomly and trades in rare natural resources. Cannot restock.
entity.minecraft.warden.description: A blind hostile mob summoned when four Sculk Shriekers have been activated. Drops nothing of value.
entity.minecraft.witch.description: A ranged hostile mob found in Witch Huts and Raids that throws potions.
entity.minecraft.wither.description: An undead ranged hostile boss mob built from Soul Sand and Wither Skulls that fires destructive projectiles. Drops a Nether Star.
entity.minecraft.wither_skeleton.descrip: A hostile mob found in Nether Fortresses that inflicts Wither on hit. Rarely drops a Wither Skull.
entity.minecraft.wither_skull.descriptio: A projectile that explodes on hit. Drops a Wither Rose per kill.
entity.minecraft.wolf.description: A neutral mob that can be tamed with Bones and protects its owner.
entity.minecraft.zoglin.description: An undead hostile mob created when a Hoglin leaves The Nether that attacks all other mobs indiscriminately.
entity.minecraft.zombie.description: An undead hostile that spawns in the dark, attacks Villagers, and burns in sunlight.
entity.minecraft.zombie_horse.descriptio: An undead passive mob that spawns in the dark, can be tamed through riding, bred with Red Mushrooms, and burns in sunlight.
entity.minecraft.zombie_nautilus.descrip: A neutral aquatic mob that can be found ridden by Drowned in oceans.
entity.minecraft.zombie_villager.descrip: An undead hostile mob that transforms back into a Villager if weakened and fed a Golden Apple.
entity.minecraft.zombified_piglin.descri: An undead neutral mob found in The Nether that attacks as a horde when provoked.
item.minecraft.mine_ingredient: An item that can be used in a Mine Crafter to affect the generation of a new Mine. It's a strange find.
lore.minecraft.activator_rail: A type of rail that can enable or disable Minecarts with Hoppers and trigger Minecarts with TNT.
lore.minecraft.air_block: A block that can be eaten to regain air, or used to inflate Moon Cows. It's a strange find.
lore.minecraft.allium: A flower that can be crafted into Magenta Dye or placed in a Flower Pot.
lore.minecraft.amber_block: A solid block of Amber. It's a strange find.
lore.minecraft.amber_gem: A currency used when trading with Villagers. It's a strange find.
lore.minecraft.amethyst_block: This block can repeat vibrations. This item can't be crafted back into Amethyst Shards.
lore.minecraft.amethyst_cluster: A fully grown Amethyst Cluster. Drops Amethyst Shards when mined.
lore.minecraft.amethyst_shard: A gem that can be used to craft Spyglasses or Tinted Glass.
lore.minecraft.ancient_debris: A block that can be smelted into Netherite Scrap.

lore.minecraft.armor_stand: A convenient mannequin that can be used to display your wearable items.

lore.minecraft.axolotl_bucket: A bucket with an Axolotl inside.

lore.minecraft.azure_bluet: A flower that can be crafted into Light Gray Dye or placed in a Flower Pot.
lore.minecraft.baked_potato: A vegetable that can be eaten to restore saturation.

lore.minecraft.beetroot_seeds: A seed that can be planted to grow Beetroot.

lore.minecraft.bread: A bread that restores a good amount of saturation.

tag.minecraft.axes.description: A slow, shield-breaking weapon that effectively mines wooden blocks.
